title: OS Detection & Registry Framework
description: Implement OS detection system with hybrid mode: YAML config primary, /etc/os-release + uname dynamic detection secondary. Create OS registry with known domestic Chinese OS distributions (Ubuntu Kylin, Deepin, Anolis, etc.) and auto-discovery for unknown distributions.

criteria: OS detection returns correct OS family for known distributions via /etc/os-release
Config file overrides dynamic detection when OS is explicitly specified
Unknown distribution triggers auto-discovery and registers with detected info
Registry lookup by distro ID returns correct OSInfo

files.target: YAML config for known domestic OS

implementation: Create OSInfo dataclass with fields: id, name, family, version, package_manager, command_paths
Implement OSDetector class with detect() method using /etc/os-release + uname fallback
Implement OSRegistry class with register(), lookup(), and load_config() methods
Create YAML config file with known domestic OS: Ubuntu Kylin, Deepin, Anolis, StartOS, etc.
Implement auto-discovery that creates OSInfo from detected values for unknown distros
Add tests covering: known distro detection, config override, unknown distro auto-registration
